name: Cheese Fondue
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, heat the wine until it is barely simmering.
2. Add the garlic to the heated wine.
3. Dredge the Gruyere cheese in cornstarch and add it to the wine.
4. Stir until the cheese melts completely.
5. Add the kirsch and seasonings (nutmeg, salt) to the mixture.
6. Continue stirring until everything is smooth and well combined.
7. Transfer the mixture into a fondue pot and keep warm over an alcohol lamp while serving.
Serve with chunks of French bread, slices of apples and pears, and quartered carrots for dipping.
